allProfiles.name: confessional-screen
allProfiles.note: THE one. Gothic arch, diamond lattice like the NYT paper-cut piece you sent. Use as the main frame around the video chat.

allProfiles.name: landing-hero
allProfiles.note: Big and ornate for the landing page. Metatron tile border with the cross centered. Monotype ornaments book energy.

allProfiles.name: waiting-room
allProfiles.note: Circular, breathing. For the matching/waiting screen. Seed of life = genesis, becoming, something about to happen.

allProfiles.name: video-frame
allProfiles.note: Small and tight. This wraps each individual video feed. Dense dot mesh = the confessional grate / screen between you and the stranger.

allProfiles.name: paper-lace-delicate
allProfiles.note: The Victorian funeral card vibe from your lace references. Oval vesica with flower chars. For modals, about page, or overlays.

allProfiles.name: grate-divider
allProfiles.note: Not a frame — use this as a vertical or horizontal divider strip. The confessional partition. Crop to a narrow column.

allProfiles.name: hunchback-dense
allProfiles.note: Inspired by that Chungmok Notre-Dame ASCII cover you sent. Maximum density, box drawing + sacred chars. For big dramatic moments.

allProfiles.name: mobile-minimal
allProfiles.note: Stripped back for small screens. Thin border, minimal chars, still reads as lace.
